extraction.one_line_summary: HEALY Ben soloed from 50km out after attacking the 13-rider breakaway on the first ascent of Salita dei Cappuccini, winning by 1:49.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC attacked GC group on final climb, gaining 14 seconds on EVENEPOEL while THOMAS/GEOGHEGAN HART paced aggressively for INEOS.
Breakaway took 80km to establish despite only 3-star difficulty rating, suggesting unusually aggressive peloton or headwind conditions early.
DSM allowed 13-rider break despite MILAN's minimal points jersey lead, revealing confidence in controlling deficit over flat run-in.

rider_signals.HEALY Ben: positive: Second youngest Irish Grand Tour stage winner ever, attacking 50km out from 13-rider break shows exceptional confidence progression.
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: First visible weakness showing in race, losing 14 seconds to ROGLIC on final climb despite controlling overall race.
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Opportunistically attacked when EVENEPOEL faded, clawing back time (30s deficit) before crucial TT where he's expected to lose heavily.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: INEOS deployed dual GC threat with GEOGHEGAN HART pacing on final climb, tactical aggression suggests belief EVENEPOEL vulnerable.
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: neutral: Involved in apparent conflict/mechanical with BAIS, unusual discord for Giro TT favorite day before his specialty stage.
